## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Mindr and GrowthX to discuss content production progress, process improvements, and address outstanding questions.](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production pipeline: 69 approved topics, 31 articles pending review, 9 approved for legal review](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Process improvements: Adding primary keyword column to Airtable, implementing Jira integration for streamlined reviews](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Custom scraper tool: Methodology figured out, implementation in progress, update expected next week](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Content quality focus: Emphasis on readability, empathy, and simplified language in articles](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Status

  - [69 total approved topics](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [31 articles pending review](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [9 articles approved for legal review](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [17 topics awaiting approval](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [30 cases waiting for review](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [11 articles in "content realized" status (new stage after addressing comments)](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [3 articles ready for publication](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [Goal: Produce 26 new articles next week](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [Adding primary keyword column to Airtable for better tracking](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Implementing Jira integration for streamlined review process](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [Custom buttons in Airtable to send content to Jira at different stages](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Revised workflow: Brian review → Jessica review → Legal review](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [New status added: "Content realized" for articles with addressed comments](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)

### Custom Scraper Tool Development

  - [Methodology for building the tool figured out by Daniel (CTO)](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Implementation in progress, facing some challenges](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [Update on launch timeline expected next week](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Tool aims to efficiently gather state-specific DUI law information](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)

### Content Quality Enhancements

  - [Focus on improving readability of articles](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Emphasis on empathy and emotional connection with readers](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Incorporating FAQs as headings](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Simplifying language for better comprehension](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)

### Topic Discussions

  - [Clarified approach for long-tail keywords (e.g., "How long after smoking weed can you get a DUI?")](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Discussed handling of diversion programs in content](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
      - [Agreed to add disclaimers about potential county-specific programs](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [Reviewed several proposed topics, making decisions on relevance and search volume](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Website Launch Update

  - [Original launch date (end of October) pushed back](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=2404.0)
  - [Estimated 2-3 week delay from the previous target date](https://fathom.video/share/JKnVXkAqwNcmh-GQCKgYRdRj5LP5rwyf?tab=summary&timestamp=2418.0)
